description: Detects exported functions that expose ORM/database implementation types in their return type. Simplified from Rust: flags all function_declaration nodes inside export_statement nodes. Cannot inspect return type text for specific ORM type names -- all exported functions with return types flagged. Language scoped to typescript only.

flag.message: Exported function detected -- verify the return type does not expose ORM/database implementation types (PrismaClient, Repository, etc.) to consumers
